rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0001
rows.name:
Here, mo! This place is famous
for delicious breakfast, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0003
rows.name: What's wrong, Idaten, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0004
rows.name: Something bothering you?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0005
rows.name: Something bugging you, or what?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0006
rows.name: Is there something wrong?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0007
rows.name: Is something bothering you?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0008
rows.name: ...It's no good!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0009
rows.name: No good? What's no good, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0010
rows.name:
...I just don't feel like eating the
food from this place right now.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0011
rows.name: Do you dislike this place, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0012
rows.name: I don't dislike it.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0013
rows.name:
But still, no way! Idaten
wants to go somewhere else!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0014
rows.name: Idaten wants to go eat in Avaritia!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0015
rows.name:
If we go to Avaritia now, Tora
will starve to death, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0016
rows.name:
Ah, it won't take that long.
I'll just pop over and be back
in the blink of an eye!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0017
rows.name: Only Idaten can do that, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0018
rows.name: Enough, we eat here, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0019
rows.name: Idaten doesn't want to!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0020
rows.name:
Calm down, you two. Idaten,
can I ask you something?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0021
rows.name: What should I ask Idaten?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0022
rows.name:
Do you have some special preferences
when it comes to breakfast?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0023
rows.name: Tell me why you don't like this place.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0024
rows.name:
Calm down, you two.
Idaten, let me hear it...

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0025
rows.name: What should I ask Idaten?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0026
rows.name:
So you're pretty picky about
your breakfast, are you?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0027
rows.name: Why do you dislike this shop?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0028
rows.name:
Calm down now, the both of
you. Idaten, tell me...

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0029
rows.name: What shall I ask Idaten?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0030
rows.name:
Do you have some particular
breakfast preferences?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0031
rows.name: What do you have against this place?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0032
rows.name:
Now hang on a minute, you two.
Idaten, tell me something.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0033
rows.name: What should I ask Idaten?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0034
rows.name: You're picky about breakfast, huh?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0035
rows.name: Why d'you hate this place so much?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0101
rows.name:
Picky? Idaten doesn't really
know what that means.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0102
rows.name:
Idaten eats anything tasty, and
won't eat anything that isn't!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0103
rows.name: Sounds pretty picky to Tora, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0104
rows.name:
Actually, that's just
being picky, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0105
rows.name:
No, you're wrong! It's
not about being picky!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0106
rows.name:
Tasty things are food.
Disgusting things aren't food!!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0107
rows.name: Idaten only eats things that are food!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0108
rows.name:
So you're saying if it tastes good
then anything counts as food?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0109
rows.name:
So in your mind, if it tastes
good then anything is food?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0110
rows.name:
So you consider anything at all
to be food if it tastes good?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0111
rows.name:
So yer sayin' if it tastes
good anything counts as food?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0112
rows.name:
Of course! Idaten would even
eat Nopon if they tasted good!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0113
rows.name: Mo?!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0114
rows.name:
T-Tora not taste good, mo!
Tora cute and adorable,
but not delicious, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0115
rows.name: Hey, don't worry!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0116
rows.name:
Idaten would never eat friends,
no matter how tasty they seem!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0117
rows.name:
...Idaten only takes a little
taste at night and holds back!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0118
rows.name: Mo-mo?!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0201
rows.name:
Oh, I get it. So that's why
Tora's feet look all wet in
the morning sometimes!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0202
rows.name:
Huh, that figures. I did think
Tora's feet looked weirdly wet
in the morning sometimes.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0203
rows.name:
Ah, I see. That would explain
why Tora's feet sometimes
look wet in the morning.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0204
rows.name:
Heh, it all makes sense now.
No wonder Tora's feet always
look wet in the morning!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0205
rows.name: Mooo!!!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0206
rows.name:
It's not that Idaten hates
this place. The food here
is actually very good.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0207
rows.name: Then what is problem, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0208
rows.name:
There are plenty of options
on the menu, so just pick
something you like, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0209
rows.name:
That's just it, there's nothing
left that I want to eat.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0210
rows.name: That's just being selfish, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0211
rows.name: Idaten not being selfish!!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0212
rows.name:
Idaten checked every item on the
menu before any of you woke up!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0213
rows.name: Mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0214
rows.name:
...Wait, are you saying what
you were eating at the inn...

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0215
rows.name:
Exactly! It was food
from this restaurant!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0216
rows.name:
Idaten already ate every
single dish on their menu!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0217
rows.name:
Hahaha! That's so like you,
Idaten. You're always so fast.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0218
rows.name:
Hahaha! That's just like
Idaten. Always so fast.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0219
rows.name:
Haha! That's so typical of
Idaten. You're always so swift.

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0220
rows.name:
Hahaha! That's so like you,
Idaten. You're always so quick!

rows.label: kizunatalk062_msg0221
rows.name:
No, that's just too fast, mo...
Tora can't keep up, mo...
